summary: Matched the Chikorita Pokémon item code by folding the separately split itchicoritaleaf translation unit into itchicorita.c, marking itchicorita.c as Matching, and updating splits/symbols/configuration accordingly. The PR removes itchicoritaleaf.c/.h, moves its state table and leaf behavior prototypes into itchicorita.c/.h, and deduplicates duplicated Chikorita physics into a static inline helper used by multiple motion states.
what_changed: Merged the former itchicoritaleaf.c text/data range into itchicorita.c in config/GALE01/splits.txt, changing itchicorita.c from 0x802C9588-0x802C9B20 and 0x803F7A98-0x803F7AC8 to the combined 0x802C9588-0x802C9D40 and 0x803F7A98-0x803F7AD8 ranges.
Changed configure.py so melee/it/items/itchicorita.c is Object(Matching) and removed the separate Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/itchicoritaleaf.c") entry.
Moved the Chikorita leaf item state table it_803F7AC8 and leaf functions such as it_802C9B20, itChicoritaLeaf_Logic30_Spawned, it_802C9CC0, and itChicoritaleaf_UnkMotion0_* into itchicorita.c.
Moved the deleted leaf header declarations into itchicorita.h, including the it_803F7AC8 extern.
Removed the itchicoritaleaf.h include from src/melee/it/it_2725.c and itchicorita.c.
Changed symbols.txt entries at 0x804DD330 and 0x804DD334 from global names it_804DD330/it_804DD334 to local float labels @153 and @274.
Refactored duplicated Chikorita motion physics code into static inline void itChicorita_Phys(HSD_GObj* item_gobj), used by itChicorita_UnkMotion0_Phys and itChicorita_UnkMotion1_Phys.
smart_moves: Treating Chikorita and Chikorita Leaf as one contiguous translation unit matched the observed address layout and allowed the whole combined item source to be marked Matching.
Removing the artificial itchicoritaleaf source/header split simplified include dependencies and avoided keeping a nonmatching object for a small contiguous leaf behavior range.

The shared static inline itChicorita_Phys helper preserved two call sites while eliminating duplicated physics logic, a useful decomp tactic when identical source bodies need to produce matching generated code.
The physics rewrite keeps the original branch/goto shape with block_11, suggesting matching was prioritized over stylistic simplification.
Updating splits.txt, symbols.txt, configure.py, and headers together kept the build configuration, linker symbols, and public declarations consistent with the new translation-unit boundary.
decomp_lessons: If two adjacent item files are split at an artificial boundary but share one logical translation unit in the original binary, merging them can be necessary for a match.
When deleting a small helper item file, move both its functions and its ItemStateTable externs into the surviving item header so central item dispatch code can continue to reference them.
Matching work may require converting global-looking sdata2 float symbols back to local labels when the constants become local to the newly matched translation unit.
Inline helpers can be useful for matching duplicated functions, but the helper may need to be static inline rather than a normal out-of-line function to preserve expected code generation.
For item physics routines, preserving sign checks, fall-speed max checks, and explicit goto labels can matter for matching even when the logic could be expressed more cleanly.
naming_conventions: Main item functions use the existing itChicorita_* prefix, while leaf-specific logic uses itChicoritaLeaf_Logic30_* and itChicoritaleaf_UnkMotion0_* spellings as already present in the deleted header.
Address-named functions such as it_802C9B20 and it_802C9CC0 were retained rather than renamed without stronger semantic evidence.
The moved state table kept the existing symbol name it_803F7AC8.
The helper name itChicorita_Phys reflects shared internal physics behavior and was made file-local with static inline.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Merged contiguous .text/.data split ranges for itchicorita.c and itchicoritaleaf.c into one object to match the original translation-unit layout.
Marked itchicorita.c as Matching in configure.py only after absorbing the leaf code and removing the separate leaf object.
Used a static inline helper to share duplicated physics logic without introducing a separate emitted function.
Preserved a goto label named block_11 in the physics helper to maintain the compiler's branch structure.
Adjusted sdata2 symbols from global it_804DD330/it_804DD334 to local labels @153/@274, consistent with constants local to the matched object.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided excerpt. The PR appears to have merged quickly, but there is no evidence in the slice of specific reviewer feedback or requested changes.
follow_up_queries: Find other Pokémon item PRs that merged projectile/child item files into a parent item file for matching.
Search for other artificial item translation-unit splits around adjacent .text/.data ranges in config/GALE01/splits.txt.
Look for uses of static inline helpers to deduplicate physics functions while preserving matching codegen.
Check future renaming opportunities for it_802C9B20 and it_802C9CC0 if stronger Chikorita leaf spawn/reset semantics are established.
